content: My guess is you have an antivirus problem. Click the view button and see who issues this unsupported certificate. I am guessing it is a self signed one issued by your antivirus. That is how they hack your security to scan email.

content:
Well for anyone even slightly interested in my plight it is now fixed. When I take my cursor up to the TB icon at the top of the screen it always gives me options in the form of miniature pages depending on what I am working on. Recently one of those options was a blank grey page which I had been ignoring however a few minutes ago I "X"ed that page and now that offending rectangle has disappeared from my TB and everything is normal again.

Obviously (in hindsight) for reasons unknown to me TB thought the page was important and need me to deal with it before any email was sent. Now that I have dealt with it by just removing it TB is happy again and so am I.
creator: g.lahey
